use_cases: Displaying a list of recent news articles in a dashboard
Showing latest updates in a media or publishing platform
Creating a news feed section for SaaS applications
Building a news aggregator widget for content websites
Displaying dated news items with images and source attribution
ai_summary: A responsive news card component that displays a list of articles with image thumbnails, titles, dates, and source attributions. Features smooth staggered entrance animations using Framer Motion. Theme-adaptive with CSS variable support for dark/light modes. Includes a header with title and 'View All' action link. Designed for displaying news feeds, updates, or article lists in modern web applications.
